events.content: Keep app-server plans attach-only for now: Keep app-server plans attach-only for now

raw.question: Keep app-server plans attach-only for now
raw.chosen: Keep app-server plans attach-only for now
raw.reasoning: The Rust broker can execute durable JSON plans and report an attached host PID, but broker-owned app-server supervision would need explicit lifecycle ownership; rejecting broker-owned host plans avoids a half-supported mode.

retrospective.summary: Fixed harness runtime review issues: broker now tracks harness PID separately from worker wrapper PID, validates app-server plans at spawn, extends app-server release grace, avoids app-server delivery_verified overclaiming, and updates SDK/docs examples around env allowlists, permission flags, and attached app-server hosts.
